articles.title: FBI Warns of New Phishing Scheme Targeting Microsoft Users
articles.description: The FBI alerts Microsoft Teams, Outlook, and OneDrive users about a new phishing scheme. Users are urged to remain vigilant against suspicious communications.
articles.impact: Increased vigilance is essential for Microsoft users.

articles.title: Asha Sharma Updates on Xbox Progress for 2026
articles.description: Xbox CEO Asha Sharma discusses ongoing improvements and challenges for Xbox in 2026. The focus remains on building a stronger gaming platform.
articles.impact: Xbox aims for significant enhancements this year.

articles.title: Microsoft Faces Threat from Disgruntled 0-Day Hunter
articles.description: A disgruntled 0-day hunter threatens to release exploits against Microsoft. The situation escalates as Microsoft involves law enforcement.
articles.impact: Microsoft's security is under serious threat.

articles.title: Apple Releases Public Betas for iOS and macOS
articles.description: Apple has launched the first public betas of iOS 26.6 and macOS Tahoe 26.6. Users can now test new features ahead of official releases.
articles.impact: Apple engages users with early software access.

articles.title: Critical Gogs Vulnerability Allows Code Execution
articles.description: A critical RCE vulnerability in Gogs enables authenticated users to execute arbitrary code. Over 1,000 instances are exposed.
articles.impact: Immediate action is required to secure Gogs instances.

articles.title: Intel Launches Arc G3 CPUs for Handheld Gaming
articles.description: Intel officially announces the Arc G3 CPU family, optimized for handheld gaming PCs. The series features powerful integrated graphics.
articles.impact: Intel targets the growing handheld gaming market.

articles.title: Steam Deck Price Hike Raises Concerns
articles.description: Valve announces a significant price increase for the Steam Deck, raising costs by $240 to $300. This raises doubts about the upcoming Steam Frame VR headset.
articles.impact: Valve's pricing strategy raises market concerns.

articles.title: Qualcomm Launches Snapdragon C for Budget Windows 11 Devices
articles.description: Qualcomm introduces the Snapdragon C SoC aimed at affordable Windows 11 devices, expected to retail around $300. This targets budget-conscious consumers.
articles.impact: Qualcomm aims to capture budget market share.

articles.title: Donkey Kong 64 Coming to Nintendo Switch Online
articles.description: Nintendo confirms that Donkey Kong 64 will be available on Switch Online starting June 4. Fans can enjoy the classic platformer soon.
articles.impact: Nintendo enhances Switch Online with classics.

articles.title: Xbox Deals Unlocked Sale 2026 Offers Major Discounts
articles.description: The Xbox Deals Unlocked Sale 2026 is live, featuring over 2,000 discounts on popular Xbox games. Gamers can save significantly on their favorites.
articles.impact: Gamers can take advantage of significant savings.
